About
skribbl.io
is a free online multiplayer
drawing and guessing pictionary game.
A normal game consists of a few
rounds, where every round a player has
to draw their chosen word and others
have to guess it to gain points!
The person with the most points at the
end of the game, will then be crowned
as the winner!
Have fun!

How to play
When it's your turn, choose a word you
want to draw!
